arts.ttl: Galatasaray Rule Out January Exit For Victor Osimhen, Plan to Keep Him Beyond End of Season
arts.sum: Galatasaray is determined to keep Victor Osimhen beyond his current loan deal, according to deputy chairman İbrahim Hatipoğlu. Osimhen joined Galatasaray on loan from Napoli in September after failing to secure a permanent move to Chelsea. READ: Who is Arda Guler? The 18-year-old ‘Turkish Messi’ Wanted by Europe’s Biggest Clubs Rumors swirled about potential break […]

arts.ttl: Galatasaray insist Osimhen won’t leave in January amid Juventus rumours
